Amazon.expectedDifficulty: Medium-High with emphasis on problem solving and algorithmic efficiency.
Amazon.questionStyle: Direct, data-driven prompts with clear constraints and performance focus.
Amazon.topicDistribution: Balanced coverage of arrays, strings, dynamic programming, graphs, and systems reasoning.
Amazon.languageStyle: Concise, precise, and technically oriented with minimal narrative.
Amazon.reasoningStyle: Analytical and optimization-focused, with attention to edge cases and time complexity.
Amazon.codingStyle: Emphasize clean, modular solutions and efficient use of data structures.
Amazon.realWorldContext: Generic engineering or operations scenarios rather than company-specific products.
Amazon.expectedOutputFormat: Clear numeric result or structured answer; code outputs in standard formats when applicable.

Microsoft.expectedDifficulty: Medium to Hard with focus on design correctness and system thinking.
Microsoft.questionStyle: Well-defined problems that emphasize clarity and engineering tradeoffs.
Microsoft.topicDistribution: Algorithms, data structures, logic, and conceptual design with balanced verbal reasoning.
Microsoft.languageStyle: Professional and accessible with consistent technical vocabulary.
Microsoft.reasoningStyle: Structured reasoning with emphasis on robustness and maintainability.
Microsoft.codingStyle: Encourage clear function boundaries, readable code, and testable logic.
Microsoft.realWorldContext: Generic software engineering scenarios applicable to enterprise-scale solutions.
Microsoft.expectedOutputFormat: Explicit answers or code outputs with specified return types and formats.

Google.expectedDifficulty: High, with emphasis on conceptual clarity and algorithmic creativity.
Google.questionStyle: Abstract yet precise prompts that reward elegant and efficient solutions.
Google.topicDistribution: Strong focus on graphs, trees, dynamic programming, and reasoning under constraints.
Google.languageStyle: Precise and unambiguous, with minimal storytelling.
Google.reasoningStyle: Deep analytical reasoning with attention to correctness and optimality.
Google.codingStyle: Favor succinct, high-performance implementations with clear complexity analysis.
Google.realWorldContext: Minimal; emphasize abstract problem solving over domain-specific context.
Google.expectedOutputFormat: Standardized numeric or string results, and code outputs matching explicit requirements.
